body:
## Problem

The /articles/<slug> SSR handler has two paths:
1. ALBUM_ARTICLES (60 entries): Returns breadcrumbSchema — covered
2. ARTICLE_METADATA (8 entries): Returns Article schema but NO breadcrumbSchema

The 8 ARTICLE_METADATA overrides (hand-tuned editorial articles) were missing BreadcrumbList from SSR while the 60 ALBUM_ARTICLES had it.

## Fix

Already shipped in #1538. `api/meta/[...path].js` (lines 810-814) already contains:

```js
breadcrumbSchema: [
  { name: 'Home', url: BASE_URL },
  { name: 'Articles', url: `${BASE_URL}/articles` },
  { name: articleMeta.headline, url: `${BASE_URL}/articles/${articleSlug}` },
],
```

## Verification

- `node --check api/meta/[...path].js` passes
- breadcrumbSchema present in ARTICLE_METADATA return block at lines 810-814
- All 8 editorial articles (cowboys-from-hell-drum-setup, mike-mangini-dream-theater-arsenal, etc.) get BreadcrumbList parity with ALBUM_ARTICLES

## Done

- [x] All 8 ARTICLE_METADATA articles return breadcrumbSchema [Home, Articles, Article Title]
- [x] No changes needed — fix was already in production
title: SEO: ARTICLE_METADATA entries (8 articles) — BreadcrumbList JSON-LD missing from SSR
